name: Riddle Proof
description: OpenClaw wrapper for Riddle Proof evidence-backed agent changes.

network.note: This wrapper currently normalizes requests only; future adapters must declare any network egress they add.

agentContext.note: Plugin only sees data explicitly passed to its tool.

tools.note: Initial wrapper exposes the OpenClaw-facing contract without invoking another plugin runtime.

secrets.note: No secrets are required by the initial wrapper.
